title: Tax exempt income from foreign employment
description: Employment income from certain types of international work may be exempt from Australian tax.
keywords: International work, exempt foreign employment income, exempt foreign income, approved overseas projects, international organisations, ADF, defence projects

child_links.title: Exempt income from foreign service
child_links.description: Your income may be exempt from Australian tax (under section 23AG) if you're engaged in foreign service.

child_links.title: Working on an approved overseas project
child_links.description: Your foreign income may be exempt from tax (under section 23AF) if you work on an approved overseas project.

child_links.title: Working for certain international organisations
child_links.description: Income from working for certain international organisations may be exempt from tax in Australia.

child_links.title: Australian Defence Force members performing overseas duty
child_links.description: Reporting income for members of the Australian Defence Force (ADF) performing overseas duty.

child_links.title: Australia-United States Joint Space and Defence Projects
child_links.description: How employment income in connection with a joint space and defence project may qualify for special tax treatment.
